ads.author: Kendra D. Perry-Mullis
ads.title: Sega Astro City Candy Cab Arcade Cabinet
ads.description: This was imported from Japan from an older arcade that closed down. It's currently running a "Ar-Pi-cade" which is a raspberry Pi with JAMMA arcade adapter. This allows you to play thousands of games. It has a 2player 6-button layout which is the most desirable as it can be configured for just about any game. I haven't even attempted to go into the settings to adjust anything. Everything I play works perfectly without any issues. It does have a ton of features and expandability if you want to do that.

ads.author: Shawn Kolka
ads.title: Bow and Arrow Pinball Machine
ads.description: Rally Pinball machine Bow and Arrow. Lights up but will not play game. Needs bumper rubbers replaced and repaired. Willing to take best offer or trade.

ads.author: Barbara Totillo
ads.title: Pinshield Pinball Glass Protector / Workspace Mat
ads.description: Brand New in wrapper! Blue color shown is only color i have. I currently have several available. Standard pinball glass size of any modern day pinball machine 20.5" wide x 42" High. $40 cash only each. If you buy multiples $35 each or three for $100. If the ad is up, they are available! Prices are Firm & Cash only!

ads.author: Allen Robinson
ads.title: Capcom Bowling, Upright Arcade, Capcom 1988 (Project Cab)
ads.description: Vintage Upright Arcade – Capcom Bowling (Capcom, 1988) Price: $275 $225 (or best offer) Step back into the late 80s with this original Capcom Bowling upright arcade cabinet. Released in 1988, this sports title brought the fun of bowling into the arcade scene, complete with competitive play and retro charm. It’s a nostalgic piece for collectors and fans of Capcom’s unique arcade lineup. Condition: - Cabinet is very old and needs a lot of love. - Monitor does not currently power on — likely needs new caps. - Nothing comes on at the moment; best to start troubleshooting with the power supply and work your way from there. - Sold as-is. Highlights: - Classic Capcom sports arcade with bowling gameplay. - Upright cabinet design from the golden age of arcades. - Great candidate for restoration or display in a retro collection. Important: - Price is $225, or best offer - Serious buyers only. No I don’t deliver but it can be picked up or shipped (arranged by buyer) in Powder Springs, GA.

ads.author: Dirk Smith Johnson
ads.title: Rare Williams OXO Pinball Machine
ads.description: Very rare Williams OXO pinball machine. Previously featured at the Roanoke Pinball Museum in Virginia. This is a unique electro-mechanical game that plays tic-tac-toe! This game has been in fully working condition until recently when it started blowing a fuse during game restart. It's most likely a switch contact somewhere that's broken, but I've been too busy to diagnose it, and I need the room, so I'm willing to sell it for less than I paid to someone who wants a unique game, and is willing to tinker with it. This game is basically in original condition except for being upgraded with $200+ worth of LEDs to make it brighter and more reliable.

ads.author: Allen Robinson
ads.title: Capcom Bowling, Upright Arcade, Capcom 1988
ads.description: Vintage Upright Arcade – Capcom Bowling (Capcom, 1988) Price: $350 Step back into the late 80s with this original Capcom Bowling upright cabinet. Released in 1988, this sports arcade brought the fun of bowling into the arcade scene, complete with competitive play and classic retro charm. It’s a great piece for collectors or anyone looking to add a unique game to their lineup. Condition: • Cabinet is very old and needs some love. • Monitor powers on, image is good, but probably needs new caps for long-term reliability. • Lights come on. • Sound works. • Controls are functional. • Sold as-is. Highlights: • Classic Capcom sports arcade with bowling gameplay. • Upright cabinet design from the golden age of arcades. • Fully playable — monitor, sound, lights, and controls all working. • Great candidate for restoration or display in a retro collection. Important: • Serious buyers only.

ads.description: Wild Cycle EM game. Appears to be complete. Non working. I will not respond to questions about anything else in the pictures other than the Wild Cycle game. Unless listed for sale, anything else you see is not for sale

ads.author: Allen Robinson
ads.title: P.O.W. Prisoners of War, Upright Arcade, SNK 1988
ads.description: Vintage Upright Arcade – P.O.W. Prisoners of War (SNK, 1988) Price: $325 Own a piece of late-80s arcade history! This is an original P.O.W. – Prisoners of War upright cabinet from SNK, released in 1988. Known as a classic scrolling fighter / beat ’em up, players battle their way through enemy compounds after escaping captivity. It’s a gritty, action-packed title that helped define the genre and remains a nostalgic favorite for collectors. Condition: - Cabinet is very old and needs a lot of love. - Boards need work and likely new caps. - Monitor powers on but the image quality is poor. - Lights come on. - No sound currently. - This is a project cabinet — ideal for restoration enthusiasts. Highlights: - Rare SNK beat ’em up from the golden age of arcades. - Upright cabinet with authentic late-80s design. - Great candidate for restoration or display in a retro collection. Important: - Sold as-is. - Serious buyers only. No I don’t deliver but it can be picked up or shipped (arranged by buyer) in Powder Springs, GA.

ads.author: John Cage
ads.title: Rampart Arcade Cabinet
ads.description: Empty Atari / Rampart Arcade Cabinet good for restoration, multi game, mame, or rasp pi project I have other empty cabinets, a few cranes and several jukeboxes to clear out if interested {352} 403 1821

ads.author: Allen Robinson
ads.title: Double Axle, Upright Arcade, Taitio 1990
ads.description: Vintage Upright Arcade – Double Axle (Taito, 1990) Price: $375 Bring home a piece of arcade racing history! This is an original Double Axle upright cabinet from Taito (1990). Known for its rugged off-road truck racing gameplay, Double Axle puts players behind the wheel of massive monster trucks, battling through dirt tracks, jumps, and obstacles. It’s a rare find that captures the excitement of 90s arcade culture. Condition: - Cabinet is original and shows its age — it needs some love. - Monitor has been converted to LCD. - Lights power on. - Sound is present. - Game plays and works! Highlights: - Classic Taito racing arcade with unique monster truck gameplay. - LCD conversion makes it easier to maintain. - Great candidate for restoration or display in a collection. - A working cabinet from 1990 — not something you see every day. Important: - Price is negotiable, but only slightly. - Sold as-is. - Serious buyers only. No I don’t deliver but it can be picked up or shipped (arranged by buyer) in Powder Springs, GA.

ads.author: Rocky Pal
ads.title: Pair Daytona USA 2 Battle On The Edge Sit Down Arcade Machines
ads.description: Machine on the left works properly, can use a new flyback for brighter picture or adjustment, works fine. Everything works as it should. Coin chutes not used/tested on both machines. Machine on the right needs some work. It is also on Battle On The Edge and I have successfully had it in slave mode and linked but the force feedback on the machine does not work properly is very week. The screen is nice. I have extra parts even boards from a working machine that haven't tried replacing yet. Not the stack, the ones related to feedback. If this is your things, easy. I have a good 4 button panel for second machine as well. Will require some disassembly to get out the door.

ads.author: Rick Edwards
ads.title: Space Invaders arcade game
ads.description: Original arcade game from the early 1980’s. Has. Been in climate control storage for 15 years. Worked when I put it away but it is not powering up now. Take it as is. Located in Arlington.

ads.author: John Russo
ads.title: Tekken 3 coin operated arcade game
ads.description: Great looking conversion into what was a Mortal Kombat cabinet. 25 inch CRT is bright and clear Works 100%. Good for your man cave, your Airbnb, or your commercial application. Can arrange local delivery nationwide shipping always glad to take trades for other coin games.

ads.author: Matt Drowne
ads.title: Arkanoid Supertop Arcaid Game
ads.description: 1986 Taito Arkanoid Supertop video game. Game works great and powers up. I just turned it on before posting. There are a couple wear marks and peeling along the edge but game its self is great. The white one player button does need to be replaced. Game does have a free play button installed from before I purchased it. Looking for $750 OBO. I can not ship. If it is posted it is available. This comes as is.

ads.author: Robert Stotts
ads.title: Classic Shinobi Full Size Arcade Game
ads.description: This is a full size original Shinobi arcade game. Fully functional and working. It has the original PCB motherboard and I have installed an eprom conversion kit to prevent it from not playing anymore after a certain amount of plays, but I also still have the original EPROMs in case you want to convert it back. I also have the original PCB motherboards for Aliens and Robocop if you are interested. in that as well.

ads.author: Rocky Pal
ads.title: Williams Stargate Playing Blind Updated
ads.description: Moved to a different room and started playing blind. Also noticed Marquee not lit now so hoping as easy as the ac line to it. I will pull out and can make video with sound, etc just wanted to get it out there in case. It's been 5 years or so but control panel is excellent overlay, the board was shopped out with the old ram removed and replaced with the industry standard as well as newer style arcade power supply to avoid the original mcr problems. Original stick and buttons. Any questions just ask.

Machine is fully functional including coin slots. For a collector, this is a really nice find. Located in Lacombe LA, pickup only.

ads.author: Preston Burt
ads.title: Vintage Capcom MAGIC SWORD Arcade Game (1990)
ads.description: Selling a vintage MAGIC SWORD arcade game by Capcom. This game was assembled from a New Old Stock (NOS) Kit by local resto expert (Mitch N) around 2015. The monitor is also a NOS monitor with maybe 250 hours on it total. The only thing missing on this is the clear plexiglass over the monitor and bezel, but since it's in my private home collection, it isn't a big deal to me. Game is available for ground-level pickup at my home in Gainesville, GA 30506. Asking $1,000 OBO and I'm open to trades.
